paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.65, with a change of 8.66% compared to the prior close, and a change of -25.86% over a window of 21 sessions. The price is as of July 21, 2026.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with a headline announcing the second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, which is scheduled for August 13, 2026. Recent news also includes an announcement of the arrival of Siemens turbines at the Port of Houston, as mentioned in a social post.

Fermi Inc. has filed several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson, and an 8-K form announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There is also one Form 4 filing in the feed, with a total of 25 filings.
